title: freeradius bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:

- Rebase to upstream 3.0.27
  Resolves: RHEL-102101

[3.0.21-45]
- Expose ca_path_reload_interval in configuration files
  Resolves: RHEL-93552
